title: spzi's Classic Pack Base
description: Simplifying Minecraft by stripping away hundreds of blocks, items, and mobs to capture the essence of Beta while ensuring compatibility with the modern engine!
body:
**Are you tired of the countless distractions and overwhelming features included with modern Minecraft versions?**

Experience the essence of classic gameplay with the simplicity and charm of Minecraft's beta 1.7.3 era, near-seamlessly bringing it into the modern 1.20.1 engine for performance, modding and quality of life features!

This is not a 100% recreation of Beta 1.7.3 as certain quality of life features are included.

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/OQZkC3Wa03c" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

## Classic Pack Base Specific Features
###  **Config to enable shader support included [Shaders will not work if you don't swap the Nostlgic Tweaks Config!!!]**
- Enhanced Hybrid Beta Terrain Generation **[Huge Caves]**
- Mixture of classic and modern crafting recipes **[As many beta recipes as I could find]**
- Previously non-craftible blocks in beta now craftible **[Sponges, all-log blocks]**
- Added Smooth Stone Bricks set **[The only addition aside from world-gen that's non-vanilla]**
- Modern Textures Supported! **[Hybrid style]**
- You can still dye leather armor!
- Config for servers included 
- Support for advanced custom blockbench avatars via Figura

## Beta Features
- No structures other than Dungeons **[Only beta loot!]**
- No hunger/sprinting **[Use "Realistic Stamina" mod if you want sprinting]**
- No modern mobs
- No modern biomes **[Except aquatic related]**
- No modern blocks **[Except variants like stairs and slabs, no walls]**
- No offhand
- Classic UI and Menu styling

## Faithful Beta World Generation
- To enable true Beta world generation, simply remove the Cascades datapack from Paxi in the config!
- The other datapacks control crafting, mobs and general removal of features.


Smaller features not listed, play it to find out!
